subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter dated the 11th of Shawwal hath been received. The feast that was arranged, and the gathering [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه بتاریخ ١١ شوال وصول یافت مجلس ضیافتی که تشکیل شد و انجمن
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @war and peace, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @predictions and prophecies, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics
